{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118224005AF4095255A1A536406"}"},"total":2308},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7348430909049094937","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊是是是，女反派最香了不用重复说，我也知道香，“主角”叶枫我知道是披着羊皮的狼，而真男主重生我也知道，不用重复，很好看，大家来看哇，看完睡不着的哇[害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710942535,"group_id":"7322730042457345086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nydg2TURByvprHT8UGpEj+gU9p1ukx7rD8AY61NX6MJp","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4459273613739608","user_name":"喜磕甌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4459273613739608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1676892547,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322730042457345086","book_info":{"abstract":"牛马打工仔陈洛，意外穿成了某都市小说里的反派大少。
可这反派大少，在设定上，居然是女主的舔狗？
陈洛瞬间就无语了，不是，都反派大少了，谁还舔女主啊？
于是乎...
夏清月：“陈洛，我暂时还不想谈恋爱，你等我大学毕业了再说吧，我们还是继续做朋友好吗？”
陈洛：“不了，我看我们还是别联系了，直接删除拉黑吧。”
夏清月：“啊？不是...”
...
夏清月：“陈洛，你今晚有时间吗？我想约你出来吃个饭。”
陈洛：“没空，滚！”
...
夏清月：“陈洛，我错了，对不起，我答应做你女朋友，你可以再追我一次吗？”
陈洛：“你也配？”
不仅如此，陈洛还勾搭上了小说里的富婆女反派，从此生活乐无边。
对此，陈洛表示：“舔女主干嘛？女反派不香吗？”
本书又名：《不是吧，我反派大少，需要舔你？》、《让我当舔狗？你配吗？》、《放下高冷女主，我选火热女反派》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0071cc2b2a838ac550b3f3e0b058707b","author":"百万富翁z","author_id":"","book_id":"7322730042457345086","book_name":"你们都舔女主？那女反派我抱走了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7322730878092722750","read_count":"31117","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2102331"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"621","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,多女主,反派,穿书,校花,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4145f6c3b9a548bcba8e9c51e1437b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272561&x-signature=smwbvJCRMiIGG3RaXLDXdJD7UtA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"356671381575559","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","no
